reviews.review_description: Seems to only be a demo. I didn't see more than installing ram and a gpu before demo reset.

developer_response.body:
Hi Justin,

As of today, the full experience is available to be purchased from the store.

If you are interested in trying it out, you can use the code launch_20-1849D1 to get 20% off of your first term.

If you have any other questions or concerns you can reach out to me directly at ewelling@changefied.nl

Cheers, Erik
